company: GE Medical Systems Ultrasound and Primary Care Diagnostics
intended_use: Vscan Air is a battery-operated software-based general-purpose ultrasound imaging system for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals or practitioners that are legally authorized or licen
intended_use_full: Vscan Air is a battery-operated software-based general-purpose ultrasound imaging system for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals or practitioners that are legally authorized or licensed by law in the country, state or other local municipality in which he or she practices. The device is enabling visualization and measurement of anatomical structures and fluid including blood flow. The information can be used for basic/focused assessments and adjunctively with other medical data for clinical diagnosis purposes during routine, periodic follow-up, and triage.
ground_truth: Manual annotation by annotators who placed 4-6 images representing different bladder volume status with 4 different anatomical landmarks per view (bladder edges) representing caliper placement locations
other_metrics: Automatic caliper placement success rate: 92.24% with 90% confidence level; Performance by BMI: Overweight (>25): 92% success rate, Normal (<25): 95% success rate
